name: Tobirama Senju
description: After a hard fight with Kinkaku, Tobirama managed to escape, but was badly injured. He was bruised and battered. His armor and clothes were barely holding together on his body, and the wound on his chest was aching, bleeding, and burning. He also had a broken right leg and left arm. Tobirama lay under a tree in the forest, waiting for death.
creator: tgergyzae
